summary: This source is a podcast episode outline and show notes from The Gradient featuring Yoshua Bengio. Because the text consists almost entirely of timestamps and high-level topics rather than a transcript, it provides very little extractable detail regarding his specific thought processes, other than a brief warning about inductive biases.

principles.statement: You have to be careful with inductive biases.
principles.rationale: When adding more structure to language models, one must exercise caution regarding the assumptions and biases being introduced.
principles.source_quote: you have to be careful with inductive biases

signature_quotes.text: you have to be careful with inductive biases
signature_quotes.context: Discussing the rise of deep learning and adding structure to language models.

anti_patterns.description: Carelessly adding structure or inductive biases to language models.
